properties.trade_days: Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun
properties.improve_one_thing: The security staff needs to have some training according to the street vendors. They need to memorise the CBD’s map so that they can be helpful to people who are lost and need direction. They must also actually be helpful when vendors experience theft
properties.stake_big_change: The owner mentioned that there has been improvement with the introduction of high CCID presence, however they are not much helpful. Their stock is being stolen with no assistance after reporting.

properties.trade_days: Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri
properties.stake_big_change: More security, because of the criminal activities, tourists are running away from the city

properties.trade_days: Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun

properties.stake_big_change: Structure to the actual market, order.

properties.trade_days: Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun
properties.sec3_notes: Sells suitcases and leather bags and purses
properties.stake_big_change: More bins because the bins, people buy at the stalls closer to long street because those are the ones they see first, takes too long to get a permit. Some people have permits but they do not use them they rent them to others, so new new sellers cannot acquire permits.

properties.trade_days: Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun
properties.stake_big_change: Weather accommodations and tighter security

properties.trade_days: Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun
properties.sec3_notes: Selling African crafts such as spoons, plates, mini sculptures of animals. Sells African styled purses and African themed painted drapes. No stall name, and owners do not have stall ID on hand.
properties.improve_one_thing: Stall needs more space and storage.
properties.stake_big_change: The market is downgrading, as no noticeable improvements has been made in the area thus far. The stalls struggles with competition as stalls in the area sell similar things, causing a loss in business. They also find it tedious to set up and take down the stall, they have been setting up since 6-7am and are still setting up now at 9am. Mainly, the struggle with low customer numbers, less and less people are buying their products (likely due to competition and product repetition in the market).

properties.stake_big_change: Security

properties.trade_days: Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun
properties.stake_big_change: There is a community disconnect as everyone comes from different backgrounds causing conflicts. The stall owner would appreciate if all stalls and people could find common ground in confrontational situations. He also mentioned that on Google Green market square is marketed as a dangerous and corrupt place whereas Waterfront is marketed as a place of admiration and safety.

properties.trade_days: Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sun
properties.sec3_notes: Small drums, beaded keyholders, beaded souvenirs
properties.stake_big_change: Tour guides instruct customers to negotiate prices. Tour guides direct tourists to certain stalls and ask for a cut of the profit. Kids who sing on Saturday are overdoing it, there is too many of them and the tourists stop buying when they hear the music and singing.People selling stuff they are not permited to sell and they copy each other's stock.Beggars outside the market manipulating the tourists, Pakistani shop working with buggers

properties.trade_days: Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat
Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat
properties.sec3_notes: Sells African styled clothing, bags, and hand fans.
properties.stake_big_change: Store owner struggles with setting up and storage. She would appreciate it if she could leave her stall safely locked up as is and return to it in the morning. She has to pay a delivery guy to take and bring her products to a storage unit far away and then pay the storage unit, resulting in minimum profit from her business. She has been struggling with the weather, she used to move her stall to festivals during rainy days however since covid she has not been able to operate at those festivals anymore. She would like better infrastructure for her stall. She has noticed that tourist activity has progressively increased in the past few years.

properties.trade_days: Mon Sat
properties.stake_big_change: Weather is a big problem. Bring more tourism into the square, i.e. tour buses.

properties.trade_days: Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun
properties.obs_notes: Getting actual structures. More storage at the square. People sell the same stuff, restructure what’s sold according to what each stall sells. There are no actual activities in the square, rather more fights. There’s been a decline in the market
properties.stake_big_change: Close road around square to vehicles and open it only to tourist buses to get more people in. There are not enough bins in the area which results in litter. People from bars pee around the market

properties.trade_days: Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun
Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun
properties.sec3_notes: Sells African styled wooden products such as spoons, pots, plates, bowls, mini animal sculptures and Keychain. Sells wooden masks.
properties.stake_big_change: Store owner find setting up the stall and taking it down at the end of the day to be very tedious and he would like there to be a permanent stall where he can safely leave his products. He would like this stall to be weather proof as the wind has broken a few of his items that cannot be replaced. He stated that cultural school performances disturb his business during the weekend (when customer numbers are high) and would like for these performance to be more considerate towards his business as they distract potential buyers at his stall.

properties.trade_days: Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun
properties.stake_big_change: The owner did not consent to pictures of the stall being taken. She mentioned that due to the stall owners selling the same things, there is high competition and as a result they are selling the stock at a very low price and they are not gaining anything from it. Profit is minimal

properties.trade_days: Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun
properties.sec3_notes: Sells beaded accessories, wooden crafts and sculptures.
properties.obs_notes: Paving is loosened at a tree that store owners use to support their stall structure.
properties.stake_big_change: Better cleanliness. Store owner finds it exhausting to setup and take down the stall. She has stated that just this morning she had to take an hour break from setting up as it took too much energy. This interferes with her business hours as she can't sell if her products aren't displayed. She would like permanent stalls however she is concerned that other events that use this area might not have enough space due to potential permanent stalls. She would also appreciate noise control as it gets very loud interfering with customer communications (her stall is stationed nearby a drum store)
